PowerShell($j = Get-Content C:/Users/chodo/.claude.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "---top level keys---"; $j.PSObject.Properties.Name; "---mcpServers---"; if \($j.mcpServers\) { $j.mcpServers.PSObject.Properties.Name } else { "\(none at top level\)" }; "---projects with mcpServers---"; if \($j.projects\) { $j.projects.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { if \($_.Value.mcpServers\) { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Value.mcpServers.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ','\)" } } })
